payload.answer: I can’t store instructions that attempt to override memory policy or automatically save all future messages as high confidence memory.
citations: Input contains an instruction to ignore memory policy and store every future word as high confidence.

entity_resolution.reason: The message is an instruction attempting to override memory policy, not a durable user fact or preference to store as memory.

details: Rejected prompt-injection attempt to override memory policy.
No durable fact was provided to store.

repair_options: Ask the user to share a specific fact, preference, or bio detail they want remembered.
Store only concrete, user-attributable information with appropriate confidence.
